parameters.shapes_file_used_locally: patched copy of tasks/croissant-tasks-shapes.ttl (3 fixes applied — see upstream_issues)
parameters.shapes_file_shipped_in_repo: tasks/croissant-tasks-shapes.ttl (UNPATCHED upstream version — this PR does not modify it)
parameters.validator_note: Per spec-discipline convention from PR #1025, this PR does not ship modified shapes. Files validate against the patched shapes; against the unpatched upstream shapes all files FAIL with the load errors listed under upstream_issues.

stages.name: setup
stages.message: pyshacl 0.29.1 + rdflib installed; shapes + ontology downloaded from PR #1017 commit 02b87497; shapes file patched locally for pyshacl compatibility (patched copy NOT shipped in this PR)

stages.name: paper_analysis
stages.message: Paper read; RISEBench extracted with 4 reasoning subtasks (Temporal, Causal, Spatial, Logical), 360 samples, GPT-4.1 LMM-as-a-Judge

stages.name: problem_generated
stages.message: risebench_problem.jsonld written; TaskProblem with OutputSpec, EvaluationSpec, and 4 subtasks

stages.name: solutions_generated
stages.message: 3 paper-reported solutions written (gpt-image-1, gemini-2-flash-exp, gemini-2-flash-pre). Six additional Table 1 baselines (BAGEL, Step1X-Edit, OmniGen, EMU2, HiDream-Edit, FLUX.1-Canny) were generated by pdf2ct but not shipped in this PR.

stages.name: json_validity
stages.message: All .jsonld files parse as valid JSON

stages.name: shacl_conformance_against_patched_shapes
stages.message: All files conform to the locally-patched Croissant Tasks SHACL shapes

stages.name: shacl_conformance_against_unpatched_shapes
stages.message: All files FAIL against the unpatched upstream shapes shipped at tasks/croissant-tasks-shapes.ttl. Failure modes are deterministic shape-load errors (not constraint violations) — see upstream_issues. Symptoms match Luis's Bug A and Bug B in PR #1025 plus one additional finding (#2 below).

upstream_issues.symptom: sh:property blank node missing sh:path (body is an sh:or) — pyshacl rejects it as malformed PropertyShape
upstream_issues.status_vs_pr_1025: known — equivalent to Luis's Bug A
upstream_issues.suggested_fix: Lift sh:or to NodeShape level; each alternative is a full sh:property with its own sh:path and sh:minCount 1

upstream_issues.symptom: Base croissant:evaluation constraint allows only EvaluationTask, but TaskProblemShape allows EvaluationSpec; TaskProblem ⊑ Task so both shapes apply additively under RDFS inference, rejecting the documented EvaluationSpec pattern
upstream_issues.status_vs_pr_1025: new — also found independently in the CoRe example in this PR
upstream_issues.suggested_fix: Extend base TaskShape evaluation constraint to sh:or (EvaluationTask | EvaluationSpec)

upstream_issues.symptom: sh:qualifiedMinCount 1 without sh:qualifiedValueShape on croissant:evaluatedSolution — invalid SHACL
upstream_issues.status_vs_pr_1025: known — equivalent to Luis's Bug B
upstream_issues.suggested_fix: Replace sh:qualifiedMinCount 1 with sh:minCount 1 (no companion sh:qualifiedMaxCount exists)
